pageContext.name: Zurg
pageContext.description: Pixar and Disney are ready to take Toy Story fans to new realistic heights with the release of Lightyear!  Beast Kingdom's highly articulable DAH (Dynamic 8ction Heroes) figure is ready to take you 'To Infinity and Beyond' with the release of the Zurg DAH-077 figure. Following the more realistic take on Zurg, the DAH features 16 points of articulation and a highly detailed body design, which stands at an intimidating 24cm in height. The detailed color scheme of the robotic armor is matched with LED light-up functions in the scary-looking eyes and mouth. Of course, the legendary arm laser canon function is also on full display.  Disney fans, you won't want to miss adding this supervillain to your collection today!
